descriptionHtml:
Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 44i for sale 2010 | 4 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

If you are considering a spacious and reliable cruising yacht, the Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 44i for sale 2010 offers a practical and appealing option. She is registered under the Greek flag, currently operated under professional management, and offers comfortable accommodation and thoughtful features for group sailing. The yacht is in good condition, with ongoing care and several updates ensuring she remains ready for new adventures.

Specifications

  • Boat Type: Sail
  • Year Built: 2010
  • Length Over All (LOA): 13.41 m
  • Beam: 4.37 m
  • Draft: 1.7 m
  • Cabins: 4
  • Heads: 2
  • Number of Berths: 10
  • Onboard Capacity: 10
  • Daily Cruise Registration: 14 persons
  • Engine: Yanmar 4JH4-TE, 75 hp, 8,000 hours (as of October 2025)
  • Fuel Tank: 205 litres
  • Water Tank: 360 litres
  • Steering Wheels: 2
  • VAT: Not paid
  • Flag: Greek
  • Ownership: Professional

Features and Equipment

  • Sails: Roller mainsail (2017), Roller Genoa (2017)
  • Instruments: Full set of Raymarine instruments
  • Plotter: Yes
  • Autopilot: Raymarine
  • GPS: Garmin
  • Inverter: 1500W
  • Fridge: Electric
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Sound System: Osio Radio, CD player, cockpit speakers
  • Cushions: Leather
  • Dinghy: Yes
  • Outboard: Yes

The Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 44i for sale 2010 combines the practical layout and comfortable living spaces for which this range is known, supporting longer stays aboard or day cruises with a larger group. She is registered for up to 14 persons for daily charters, making her a suitable option for those considering a yacht with commercial potential or for large gatherings of friends and family.

Altogether, the Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 44i for sale 2010 presents a safe, spacious, and thoughtfully equipped yacht, well suited to both private cruising and professional chartering. Her current good condition, sensible upgrades, and professional operation support immediate use and peace of mind for her next owner. She is available for viewing and further enquiries.
